overview: Value Kart is a modern Indian e-commerce storefront offering affordable watches, shoes, gadgets, and clothes with a ₹100 cashback-after-delivery offer. Includes a secure admin panel for product and order management.
features: Mobile-first storefront with product grid and detail pages
Razorpay UPI and Cash on Delivery checkout
₹100 cashback system tracked and managed by admin
Secure admin login with product CRUD and image uploads
Order management with delivery and cashback tracking
Auto-sync products from admin panel to storefront
